documentation:
## Aliyun ROS CDN Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as CDN from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-cdn';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_cdn.Domain

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.Domain.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.Domain.attr_cname
documentation: Attribute Cname: The CNAME generated for the CDN domain.You must add a CNAME record with your DNS provider to map the CDN domain name to the CNAME.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.Domain.attr_domain_name
documentation:
Attribute DomainName: The CDN domain name.

Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::CDN::Domain`, which is used to add an accelerated domain name.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomain\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cdn-domain>

classes.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainConfig

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainConfig.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::CDN::DomainConfig`, which is used to configure multiple domain names at a time.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomainConfig\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cdn-domainconfig>

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainConfigProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `DomainConfig`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cdn-domainconfig>

```
param domain_names

Property domainNames: Your accelerated domain name, separated by commas in English.

param function_list

Property functionList: Function list. This property is required.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainConfigProps.domain_names
documentation: Property domainNames: Your accelerated domain name, separated by commas in English.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainConfigProps.function_list
documentation:
Property functionList: Function list.

This property is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Domain`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cdn-domain>

```
param cdn_type

Property cdnType: The business type. Valid values: web, download, video, livestream, and httpsdelivery. web: acceleration of images and small files download. download: acceleration of large file downloads. video: live streaming acceleration. httpsdelivery: SSL acceleration for HTTPS.

param domain_name

Property domainName: The CDN domain name. Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

param check_url

Property checkUrl: The validation of the origin.

param origin_servers

Property originServers: The list of origin URLs. It has the same function as Sources, but has a higher priority than it.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group. If this is left blank, the system automatically fills in the ID of the default resource group.

param scope

Property scope: Valid values: domestic, overseas, and global. Default value: domestic. The setting is supported for users outside mainland China, users in mainland China of level 3 or above.

param sources

Property sources: The list of origin URLs.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param top_level_domain

Property topLevelDomain: The top-level domain, which can only be configured by users on the whitelist.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.DomainProps.cdn_type
documentation:
Property cdnType: The business type.

Valid values: web, download, video, livestream, and httpsdelivery. web: acceleration of images and small files download. download: acceleration of large file downloads. video: live streaming acceleration. httpsdelivery: SSL acceleration for HTTPS.

Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

It has the same function as Sources, but has a higher priority than it.

If this is left blank, the system automatically fills in the ID of the default resource group.

Default value: domestic. The setting is supported for users outside mainland China, users in mainland China of level 3 or above.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param content: true
param port: true
param priority: true
param type: true
param weight: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.content
documentation: :Property: content: The address of the origin server. You can specify an IP address or a domain name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: The type of the origin server. Valid values:
ipaddr: the IP address
domain: the domain name
oss: the endpoint of an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket
fc_domain: the domain name of Function Compute

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.port
documentation:
:Property:

port: The port. Valid values:
80: the default port
443: the HTTPS port
A custom port

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.priority
documentation:
:Property:

priority: The priority of the origin server if multiple origin servers are specified. Default value: 20. Valid values:
20: the primary origin server
30: the secondary origin server

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.OriginServersProperty.weight
documentation: :Property: weight: The weight of the origin server if multiple origin servers are specified. Valid values: 0 to 100. Default value: 10.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param key: true
param value: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.key
documentation: :Property: key: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.value
documentation: :Property: value: undefined

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::CDN::Domain`, which is used to add an accelerated domain name.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Domain` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-cdn-domain>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::CDN::Domain`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomain\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cdn-domain>

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Domain`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cdn-domain>

```
param domain_name

Property domainName: The accelerated domain name.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainProps.domain_name
documentation: Property domainName: The accelerated domain name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.Domains.attr_domain_names
documentation: Attribute DomainNames: The list of domain names.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.Domains.attr_domains
documentation: Attribute Domains: The list of domains.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::CDN::Domains`, which is used to query the basic information about created accelerated domain names.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomains\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cdn-domains>

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainsProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Domains`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cdn-domains>

```
param domain_name

Property domainName: The accelerated domain name. You can specify only one domain name.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainsProps.domain_name
documentation:
Property domainName: The accelerated domain name.

You can specify only one domain name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_cdn.datasource.DomainsProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::CDN::Domain`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Domain` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-cdn-domain>
